chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person operates a motor vehicle or causes or allows the operation of a motor vehicle in violation of an order adopted under Section 284.202 (Order Prohibiting Operation of Motor Vehicle on Toll Project) (a).

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.203 — Violation of Order; Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person operates a motor vehicle or causes or allows the operation of a motor vehicle in violation of an order adopted under Section 284.202 (Order Prohibiting Operation of Motor Vehicle on Toll Project) (a).

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.18(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*
